title: Player: voxel damage (TACZ & Point black)
description: Voxel damage and regdoll to the player from explosions and TACZ weapons.
body:
**Voxel player damage, rivers of blood, limb severing with gore, PhysX ragdoll physics.**


![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3d7b73a73f84cff261f8e6cb23cd63f5c9427055.png)
![dead player](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/46311e16fd7bbf42892f9c4ffc440b0a1d2ecd60_0.webp)
### This mod adds visual voxel-based player injuries,
### Key features:

- A voxel "hole" appears at the point of impact on the player.

- Blood pixels at the hit location, as well as blood particles and blood pools.

- if more than 5 bullets hit within 6 ticks, a body part detaches and turns into a physical model.

-  Synchronization of player injuries between clients.

-  Upon death, the player leaves behind an interactive ragdoll model ([thanks to PhysX-JNI](https://github.com/fabmax/physx-jni)).

-  When killed by an explosion, body parts take heavy damage and are scattered.

- healing "wounds" with full HP

**commands:**
- /entity_damage models_clean - removes all physical models
- /entity_damage "player nick" reset - removes damage on the player
